name: OAuth SSO
description: OAuth 2.0 SSO with 12 providers: Google, GitHub, Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Slack, TikTok, WeChat, Autodesk.
author: Kuray Karaaslan

extensionPoints.description: An OAuth/OIDC SSO provider implementation. Satellite modules like auth_sso_google contribute their provider here; the host discovers them via the extension registry.
